commands.integrate: Get Claude integration prompt (apr robot integrate <round>)
commands.lint: Validate workflow, documents, and prompt templates without invoking Oracle
commands.render: Preview manifest + prompt for a round without invoking Oracle (apr robot render <round>; --manifest-only for manifest alone)

data.description: Robot mode for coding agents - JSON interface to APR

busy.meaning: Single-flight lock or busy state blocks this operation

internal_error.meaning: Unexpected APR bug or unknown state

not_implemented.meaning: Requested feature is not supported in this install

usage_error.meaning: Bad arguments or invalid option values

human_errors.note: Fatal human-mode failures emit this ASCII-only stderr tag before exiting.

options.--fail-on-warn: Treat lint warnings as errors (strict mode; same as APR_FAIL_ON_WARN=1)
options.--no-lint: Bypass run lint gate (explicit and noisy)
options.--stats: Show token savings statistics (JSON vs TOON byte comparison)
options.-f, --format FORMAT: Robot output format: json or toon (env: APR_OUTPUT_FORMAT, TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT)

data.quick_start: For agents: 1) apr robot status (check setup), 2) apr robot show <N> (read round), 3) apr robot integrate <N> (get prompt), 4) apr robot stats (check convergence)
